caption: A screen recording displays a web browser window open to a complex conceptual map. The map features a dark background with various interconnected circular nodes and a central white rectangular panel containing a black-and-white illustration of people in a landscape. Legible text within this panel includes "NOT TOO EITHER JUST" and "OCCUPY DRY SPACE". A smaller node nearby contains a profile picture and the green text "Eckhart Blocking". The browser's address bar shows the URL "blackboard.ucl.ac.uk/learning". In the top right corner of the interface, a small video inset shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt, looking toward the camera. Across the sequence, the screen remains mostly static, though the man in the video inset slightly shifts his position and facial expression, while the overall layout of the browser tabs and the conceptual map remains unchanged.
